s: Daily Bible verse on your lock screen wallpaper
d:
Start your day with faith, right from your lock screen! Bible Lock Screen automatically places the daily Bible verse onto your favorite photo, creating a beautiful and personal wallpaper that updates every morning. Transform your phone into a source of daily encouragement and inspiration.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Choose Your Photo: Select any image from your gallery to serve as the perfect canvas.
2. Customize the Verse: Use our powerful editor to make the text look exactly how you want. Match the color to your background, choose a font that speaks to you, and position it perfectly.
3. Activate & Enjoy: Turn on the daily automation. The app handles the rest, fetching the new verse and refreshing your wallpaper every morning.

You are in complete control. Whether you prefer a minimalist, clean style or a bold, expressive design, Bible Lock Screen gives you the tools to create it.

KEY FEATURES

- Automatic Daily Updates: Get a fresh Verse of the Day without lifting a finger.
- Personalized Backgrounds: Use your own pictures for a truly custom experience.
- Full screen widget adjuster: An intuitive, full-screen editor lets you drag to adjust size, width, and vertical position.
- Add your own verse - apply custom verse text and references instead of using the "Verse of the Day."
- Deep Customization: Fine-tune every detail, including:
    * Font Style: Modern, Book, Cursive, and more.
    * Color: Presets and a full color wheel.
    * Effects: Bold, text shadows, and transparency (alpha) control.
- Visual Effects: Add an adjustable background blur to make the text pop.
- Multi-Language Support: Available in English, Spanish, German, French, Italian, Slovak, Czech, Hungarian, and Polish.
- Modern UI: Built with Material You to seamlessly match your system's style.
- Test On-Demand: Instantly apply settings to preview your new look.

Download Bible Lock Screen today and keep inspiration just a glance away.
